title: 10 best herbal teas for queasy stomach
description: Zingiber officinale, also known as ginger, teas helps with queasy stomach because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The compounds in ginger, such as gingerol and shogaol, have been shown to soothe digestive issues and reduce nausea. This is due to their ability to relax the muscles in the stomach and improve blood flow to the digestive system.
